channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump's Beijing Visit Ends With 'Bin Order' For Chinese-Issued Items

media:content.media:description: This is not the first time friction of this kind has surfaced during a US presidential visit to China.

item.description: While Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping kept up a cordial front on camera, relations between American and Chinese press and security teams were far more strained behind the scenes.
item.content:encoded: While Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping kept up a cordial front on camera, relations between American and Chinese press and security teams were far more strained behind the scenes.

item.title: Trump, Xi And A Room Full Of Men. US-China Summit Photos Trigger Outrage

media:content.media:description: The visuals have triggered widespread backlash and a global debate regarding gender representation

item.description: Gita Gopinath, an economics professor at Harvard University, took to X and described the all-male optics as, "A painting of the end of meritocracy: A meeting of the two largest economies and not one woman at the table."
item.content:encoded: Gita Gopinath, an economics professor at Harvard University, took to X and described the all-male optics as, "A painting of the end of meritocracy: A meeting of the two largest economies and not one woman at the table."

item.title: "Not Looking To Have Wars": Trump's Message To Taiwan After Talks With Xi

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump went to Beijing for a two-day summit with Xi Jinping.

item.description: Trump's comments come after he discussed the flashpoint issue of Taiwan's independence with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.
item.content:encoded: Trump's comments come after he discussed the flashpoint issue of Taiwan's independence with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.title: Trump Leaves China With Big Claims, Few Details And No Confirmation

media:content.media:description: Despite the sweeping claims from the US side, Chinese officials offered little public confirmation

item.description: Speaking before departing China, Trump said the meetings had resulted in "fantastic trade deals" and settled "a lot of different problems" in his meetings with China's Xi Jinping this week.
item.content:encoded: Speaking before departing China, Trump said the meetings had resulted in "fantastic trade deals" and settled "a lot of different problems" in his meetings with China's Xi Jinping this week.

item.title: "Favour To Pakistan": Trump Reveals Why US Backed Ceasefire With Iran

media:content.media:description: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons

item.description: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons and that Tehran should give up the enriched uranium that it has accumulated over the years.
item.content:encoded: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons and that Tehran should give up the enriched uranium that it has accumulated over the years.

item.title: Don't Run Back To Coal Again, Says Energy Body In Hormuz Crisis Report

media:content.media:description: A coordinated clean energy push could displace the equivalent of all Hormuz flows within years.

item.description: Fossil fuel systems rely on continuous flows through narrow chokepoints like Hormuz, instantly transmitting global price spikes.
item.content:encoded: Fossil fuel systems rely on continuous flows through narrow chokepoints like Hormuz, instantly transmitting global price spikes.

item.title: Lazare, Believed To Be World's Oldest Dog, Dies At 30

media:content.media:description: Lazare spent most of his life with the same owner until she died.

item.description: Lazare, a Papillon dwarf spaniel with stand-up "butterfly" ears, was born on December 4, 1995, according to animal charity worker Anne-Sophie Moyon.
item.content:encoded: Lazare, a Papillon dwarf spaniel with stand-up "butterfly" ears, was born on December 4, 1995, according to animal charity worker Anne-Sophie Moyon.

item.title: Starbucks To Lay Off 300 Employees In US To Cut Costs

media:content.media:description: Starbucks is also closing some US offices as part of its ongoing turnaround.

item.description: No international employees are affected for now, but Starbucks said it is also reviewing its corporate structure outside the US.
item.content:encoded: No international employees are affected for now, but Starbucks said it is also reviewing its corporate structure outside the US.

item.title: A 12-Year-Old Learned How To Disable A Drone. Then One Came For His Family

media:content.media:description: The boy was celebrated as a hero across Ukraine.

item.description: The use of small commercial drones to target civilians is not new to this war.
item.content:encoded: The use of small commercial drones to target civilians is not new to this war.

item.title: Elon Musk Caught Making Faces At State Dinner While On China Visit With Trump

media:content.media:description: Musk was seen pulling different facial expressions while seated among global leaders.

item.description: Musk, who leads Tesla and SpaceX, is part of a delegation that travelled with US President Donald Trump to China.
item.content:encoded: Musk, who leads Tesla and SpaceX, is part of a delegation that travelled with US President Donald Trump to China.

item.title: Israeli Military Now Controls 60% Of Gaza Strip, Says Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu's comments come as Gaza remains gripped by daily violence. (File)

item.description: Netanyahu's comments were the first official indication that the military was expanding its footprint in Palestine.
item.content:encoded: Netanyahu's comments were the first official indication that the military was expanding its footprint in Palestine.

item.title: Russian Missile Attack On Kyiv Apartment Building Kills 24

media:content.media:description: Russia hammered Ukraine with large-scale aerial attacks in the days following a May 9-11 ceasefire.

item.description: The cruise missile hit the nine-story corner block during what the Ukrainian air force said was Russia's biggest barrage of the country since 2023.
item.content:encoded: The cruise missile hit the nine-story corner block during what the Ukrainian air force said was Russia's biggest barrage of the country since 2023.

item.title: "No Military Solution, Negotiate Seriously": Iran's Message To US From Delhi

media:content.media:description: Araghchi said there is a "shaky" ceasefire in place because Iranians want diplomacy

item.description: Addressing a press conference in New Delhi following a meeting of the BRICS foreign ministers, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi claimed that after the US became hopeless about achieving any goal in their war against Iran, they offered to negotiate.
item.content:encoded: Addressing a press conference in New Delhi following a meeting of the BRICS foreign ministers, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi claimed that after the US became hopeless about achieving any goal in their war against Iran, they offered to negotiate.

item.title: Opinion: Blog | Yahya Khan To Munir, The Curious Pak Factor In Every US-China Thaw
item.description: History suggests that whenever Washington looks toward Beijing during moments of global upheaval, Islamabad finds a way back into the game.
item.content:encoded: History suggests that whenever Washington looks toward Beijing during moments of global upheaval, Islamabad finds a way back into the game.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran's Araghchi Says "No Military Solution To Anything Related To Iran"
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: Russia Sees India As Middle East Peace Catalyst: 'Can Make Iran, UAE Talk'

media:content.media:description: Lavrov's visit to New Delhi coincides with heightened global anxiety over the Middle East tensions

item.description: The Russian diplomat said that India, as the current BRICS chair, could help bring key stakeholders together for dialogue.
item.content:encoded: The Russian diplomat said that India, as the current BRICS chair, could help bring key stakeholders together for dialogue.

item.title: LPG, Defence Partnership Framework: Big Returns From PM's Short UAE Visit

media:content.media:description: The UAE is India's third-largest trade partner

item.description: Sources told NDTV that two important memorandums of understanding, in the areas of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) and Strategic Petroleum Reserves, are likely to be concluded during this visit.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1099650/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Sources told NDTV that two important memorandums of understanding, in the areas of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) and Strategic Petroleum Reserves, are likely to be concluded during this visit.

item.title: 52% In UAE, 44% In US: How India's Rs 3 Fuel Hike Compares To Other Nations

media:content.media:description: Fuel Price Hike: India's annual crude import bill is already estimated at Rs 12-15 lakh crore.

item.description: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Around 82 countries have imposed emergency restrictions, rationing, or sharp price hikes. India has done none of this.
item.content:encoded: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Around 82 countries have imposed emergency restrictions, rationing, or sharp price hikes. India has done none of this.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak Tests Post-Covid Health Communications Playbook
item.description: A rodentborne virus with a scary name. A midocean cruise ship in quarantine. Several people dead and more falling sick. It is no wonder that an outbreak
item.content:encoded: A rodentborne virus with a scary name. A midocean cruise ship in quarantine. Several people dead and more falling sick. It is no wonder that an outbreak

item.title: "Family Knows": Thailand's Singha Beer Heir Claims Sexual Abuse By Brother

media:content.media:description: Siranudh said his mother accuses him of being ungrateful for publicly sharing details about alleged abuse

item.description: Speaking through tears, Siranudh, 29, alleged that his elder brother, Sunit "Pi" Scott, abused him from the ages of 12 to 24 in their family residences. He said the experience affected his ability to form relationships later in life.
item.content:encoded: Speaking through tears, Siranudh, 29, alleged that his elder brother, Sunit "Pi" Scott, abused him from the ages of 12 to 24 in their family residences. He said the experience affected his ability to form relationships later in life.
